creator: jcwells@u.washington.edu
text:
On Sun, 25 Apr 1999, Kris Kennaway wrote:

>Hmm, I don't think there's ever been a /usr/ports/kde/ directory - there has
>been periodic discussion about making one to group together all the kde-using
>ports, but AFAIK it's never been the case. Perhaps you meant
>/usr/ports/x11/kde all along..

As I think about it that may have been before I knew CSVUP. I would just
grab individual ports and mimic the hierarchy shomn on the website. (Where
there is a kde category) In fact, now that you tell me there never was
/usr/ports/kde, I am pretty sure that this was the case.

Good night!

Catchya Later,		|	Give me UNIX or give me a typewriter.
Jason Wells		|	http://www.freebsd.org/
